title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A YouTube news roundup covering major AI releases in a given month including Google Remy, Grok 5, Anthropic Mythos 1, DeepSeek price cuts, and Boston Dynamics Atlas robot upgrades. The presenter argues the dominant trend is the rise of AI agents capable of work, coding, and adaptation spreading faster than anticipated across multiple organizations.
